name: Winter Tomato Bisque- Country Living
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Dried tarragon or savory leaves
1/3 cup Dried tomato bits or 8 dried plum tomato halves, chopped
Chopped fresh tarragon or savory leaves and sprigs (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add onion and sauté until tender. Stir flour, tarragon, salt, and pepper into the onion until well mixed.
Gradually stir in undiluted broth and water until well combined. Add tomato bits and heat the mixture to boiling, stirring constantly.
Cover and reduce heat to low. Simmer the soup for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Meanwhile, peel, seed, and dice tomatoes. Stir undiluted tomato soup, milk, and half-and-half into the soup until well mixed.
Increase heat to medium-high and heat the soup until bubbles appear around the side of the pan.
Do not boil. Stir in diced tomatoes and heat through.
Ladle the soup into bowls. If desired, sprinkle with chopped herbs and place bowls on plates garnished with sprigs of herbs.
